name: Sourdough Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
3. Stir in sourdough starter, applesauce, cloves, cinnamon, and allspice.
4. Set aside.
5. In a small bowl, blend salt, baking soda, and 2 tablespoons sugar.
6. Sprinkle the dry mixture over the batter; gently stir until just combined.
7. Add flour; stir until smooth.
8. Stir in chopped nuts and raisins.
9. Divide batter evenly between two greased-and-floured 9-inch round cake pans.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans and allow to cool completely on wire racks.
Icing:
1. Combine softened butter, confectioners' sugar, egg yolk, maple flavoring (to taste), and 1 teaspoon sugar until smooth.
2. Whip the remaining 1 teaspoon sugar into light and fluffy with whipping cream.
3. Gently fold the whipped cream into the icing.
4. Frost the cooled cake layers with the icing.
